content.speakerText: Okay, I think I'll go with the standard plan. How do I pay?
content.speakerTextCn: 好的，我选标准计划，怎么付款？

options.text: Great choice! You can pay online now — I'll email you the confirmation.
You need to go to the office to pay in person.
I don't know how payment works, sorry.
Why are you choosing the standard plan? It's too basic.

content.explanation: 正确答案回应了客户的决定并提供了清晰的付款指引，符合积极、高效的服务语气。选项2错误地要求线下支付，与现代在线服务场景不符；选项3表现消极，不符合服务专业性；选项4质疑客户选择，语气不当。

content.speakerText: Thanks for your help — this really puts my mind at ease.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你的帮助，这让我安心多了。

options.text: My pleasure! Have an amazing trip!
I didn't do much, it was easy.
Don't mention it. Now pay up.

content.explanation: 正确答案温暖、专业，符合道别时提升沟通温度的要求。选项2过于随意，缺乏礼貌；选项3贬低自己的服务，削弱客户体验；选项4将感谢与催款结合，语境冲突且不礼貌。

content.speakerText: I've decided to book the package. What's the next step?
content.speakerTextCn: 我决定预订这个套餐了，下一步是什么？

options.text: Perfect! I'll send you the payment link right away.
You should compare other options first.
I'm not sure, maybe try another company?
Just wait. Someone will call you in a week.

content.explanation: 正确答案积极确认客户决定并立即提供下一步行动，符合结束咨询场景的高效服务原则。选项2和3在客户已做决定后仍建议比较或换公司，破坏交易节奏；选项4拖延响应，不符合现代服务标准。

content.template: Great choice! You can pay ___ online now — I'll email you the confirmation.
content.hint: 表示立即行动的关键词，用于推动交易完成
content.knowledgePoint: 时间副词在服务场景中的即时性表达

content.hint: 道别时常用的积极祝福语，表达美好祝愿
content.knowledgePoint: 旅行场景中的固定祝福表达

content.template: Thanks for everything — you've really ___ my mind at ease.
content.knowledgePoint: 动词短语 put one's mind at ease

content.speakerText: Okay, I think I'll go with the standard plan. How do I pay?
content.speakerTextCn: 好的，我选标准计划，怎么付款？
expectedAnswers: Great choice! You can pay online now — I'll send you the confirmation email.
Perfect! Just click the link I emailed you.
You're all set — payment is quick and secure online.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确引导客户完成付款
语言准确性：语法正确，无拼写或搭配错误
表达自然度：使用口语化但专业的服务用语
关键词覆盖：包含 pay / online / confirmation / link 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Thanks for your help — this really puts my mind at ease.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你的帮助，这让我安心多了。
expectedAnswers: My pleasure! Have an amazing trip!
You're so welcome — safe travels and enjoy every moment!
No problem at all! Let me know if you need anything before you leave.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：真诚回应感谢并表达良好祝愿
语言准确性：使用恰当的道别短语和语法结构
表达自然度：语气温暖、符合英语母语者习惯
关键词覆盖：包含 pleasure / trip / safe travels / welcome 等情感关键词

content.speakerText: I'm ready to confirm my booking — what do I need to do next?
content.speakerTextCn: 我准备确认预订了，接下来我需要做什么？
expectedAnswers: Awesome! Just click 'Confirm Booking' on the screen — you'll get an email with all your details.
You're all set! I'll process your booking now and send the confirmation within minutes.
Perfect! Please review your details one last time and then hit 'Pay & Confirm'.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清晰告知客户下一步操作
语言准确性：使用正确的动词时态和流程性表达
表达自然度：语气积极、有引导性，符合服务场景
关键词覆盖：包含 confirm / booking / email / details / pay 等核心词汇
